name: Chicken and Okra Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in the oil.
2. Remove the chicken and set aside.
3. Add the flour to the oil and cook until it forms a medium brown roux.
4. Add the onions, bell pepper, tomatoes, and okra. Cook slowly until the okra stops curling, which may take about an hour.
5. Gradually add 3 quarts of water. Stir gently.
6. Return the chicken to the pot. Cook slowly until the chicken is nearly falling off the bones, which may take about an hour and a half.
7. Add more water if necessary. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Stir in the parsley and onion tops. Serve over rice.
